MINI MINUTES FOR SEP-13-2024 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, HEARING RE: PETITIONER SOLAR MOSAIC LLC'S HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION FINAL AWARD. MATTER CONTESTED. DISCUSSIONS HELD REGARDING COURTESY COPIES. AT THE CONCLUSION OF COUNSEL'S COMMENTS, THE COURT VACATES THE TENTATIVE RULING AND CONTINUES THE PETITION TO FRIDAY, OCTOBER 11, 2024, AT 9:30 A.M. ON THE LAW & MOTINO CALENDAR. COUNSEL CONFIRMS FOR THE COURT THAT COURTESY COPIES HAVE BEEN DELIVERED. JUDGE: ROCHELLE C. EAST. CLERK: JACQUELINE ALAMEDA. NOT REPORTED. BAILIFF: NGUYEN. (301/RCE)
MINI MINUTES FOR OCT-11-2024 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE OCT-11-2024 HEARING RE: PETITIONER SOLAR MOSAIC LLC'S HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION FINAL AWARD, THE COURT VACATES ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND GRANTS PETITIONER SOLAR MOSAIC LLC'S UNOPPOSED PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER AND EMAIL TO CONTESTDEPT302TR@SFTC.ORG . JUDGE: ROCHELLE C. EAST; CLERK: V. DA FONSECA; NOT REPORTED. (302/RCE)
ORDER GRANTING PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION FINAL AWARD

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER SOLAR MOSAIC LLC RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT SUNTUITY SOLAR LLC $2,218,465.78 PRINCIPAL, $88,630.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $84,603.58 INTEREST, $3,740.20 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,395,439.56, SEE SCANNED DOC
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 74842611)
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PETITIONER SOLAR MOSAIC LLC

SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY, (TRANSACTION ID # 76926205): DOMEYER, MARK SUBSTITUTED FOR LUI-KWAN, KAMALA M. AS ATTORNEY FOR SOLAR MOSAIC LLC

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Final Award
Off Calendar Oct-11-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. JACOB KOZACZUK, Esq. of Troutman Pepper Hamilton Sanders LLP (tel: 858-509-6000) for Solar Mosaic LLC.
No other appearances made in this matter.

Hearing Re: PETITIONER SOLAR MOSAIC LLC's Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Final Award.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court vacates its tentative ruling and grants Petitioner Solar Mosaic LLC's unopposed petition to confirm arbitration award.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order and email to contestdept302tr@sftc.org .

Judge: Rochelle C. East; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RCE)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Final Award
Off Calendar Sep-13-2024 Continued To Oct-11-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom:
Jacob Kozaczuk, Esq. of Troutman Pepper Hamilton Sanders LLP, Tel. 858.509.6000, appearing for the Petitioner Solar Mosaic LLC;
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

Hearing re: PETITIONER SOLAR MOSAIC LLC'S Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Final Award.

The matter is contested. Counsel appears to address the courtesy copies.

At the conclusion of counsel's comments, the Court vacates the tentative ruling and continues the petition to Friday, October 11, 2024, at 9:30 a.m. on the Law & Motion calendar.

Counsel confirms for the Court that courtesy copies have been delivered.

Judge: Rochelle C. East. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Not Reported. Bailiff: Nguyen. (301/RCE)
